snapshots.code:
def maxProfit(prices):
    min_price = float('inf')
    max_profit = 0
    for p in prices
        min_price = min(min_price, p)
        max_profit = max(max_profit, p - min_price)
    return max_profit

snapshots.code:
def maxProfit(prices):
    min_price = float('inf')
    max_profit = 0
    for p in prices:
        min_price = min(min_price, p)
        max_profit = max(max_profit, p - min_price)
    return max_profit

snapshots.label: optimal-ok
snapshots.code:
def productExceptSelf(nums):
    n = len(nums)
    res = [1] * n
    prefix = 1
    for i in range(n):
        res[i] = prefix
        prefix *= nums[i]
    suffix = 1
    for i in range(n - 1, -1, -1):
        res[i] *= suffix
        suffix *= nums[i]
    return res

snapshots.label: suboptimal-ok
snapshots.code:
def trap(height):
    n = len(height)
    total = 0
    for i in range(n):
        lmax = max(height[:i + 1])
        rmax = max(height[i:])
        total += min(lmax, rmax) - height[i]
    return total

snapshots.label: suboptimal-ok
snapshots.code:
def maxSlidingWindow(nums, k):
    return [max(nums[i:i + k]) for i in range(len(nums) - k + 1)]
